full_text:
Zhou Ang 周昂
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Ang (周昂)was born in Kuaiji. Sent to attack Sun Jian, he took the camp and killed Gongsun Yue but was defeated. Zhou Ang was affiliated with Yuan Shao.
